# Genz–Malik 7/5 Cubature (3D, [-1,1]^3) — **Exact Nodes & Weights**
**Rule degree:** 7 (embedded 5)
**Abscissae:**

- λ₂² = 9/70 ⇒ λ₂ = 3/8
- λ₃² = 9/10 ⇒ λ₃ = 1/1
- λ₅² = 9/19 ⇒ λ₅ = 3/4

**Per-evaluation weights (apply to every node in the group):**
- center: **w₀ = -87488/19683 ≈ -4.44485088655**
- axis λ₂ nodes: **w₁ = 7840/6561 ≈ 1.19493979576** (6 nodes)
- axis λ₃ nodes: **w₂ = 4960/19683 ≈ 0.251994106589** (6 nodes)
- face-diagonal λ₃ nodes: **w₃ = 1600/19683 ≈ 0.0812884214805** (12 nodes)
- full-diagonal λ₅ nodes: **w₄ = 6859/19683 ≈ 0.348473301834** (8 nodes)

> **Sanity check.** For f(x)=1, the rule gives W₀ + 6·W₁ + 6·W₂ + 12·W₃ + 8·W₄ = 8 exactly.
